name: No Boundary
overview: During the Song Dynasty, Bao Longtu, who governs Kaifeng, became the new Bao Qing Tian. Duan Mucui descends to the mortal realm and establishes her own sect with the intent to vanquish demonic forces that seek to harm humans. The 4th-rank imperial guard Zhan Zhao receives orders to assist Duan Mucui, thus beginning their journey against ghosts in the pugilistic world.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: No Boundary Season 1 | 玉昭令 第一季 | iQiyi
